texto: I suppose it is possible to live as full a life in seventy hours as on seventy years
autor: granted that your life has been full up to the time that the seventy hours start and that you have reached a certain age.
explicacao: Citação de granted that your life has been full up to the time that the seventy hours start and that you have reached a certain age. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I suppose it is possible to live as full a life in seventy hours as on seventy years” articula reflexao, ernest-hemingway, seventy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
